Common types and constants for Typos

Types

Area = ref object
  panels*: seq[Panel]
  selectedPanelNum*: int
  rect*: Rect
Source   Edit   
ChatMessage = ref object
  sender*: string
  content*: string
  timestamp*: float64
Source   Edit   
Panel = ref object
  name*: string
  selected*: bool
Source   Edit   
ProviderConfig = object
  provider*: ProviderKind
  model*: string
  baseUrl*: string
  apiEnvVar*: string
Source   Edit   
ProviderKind = enum
  ProviderLmStudio, ProviderOpenAi, ProviderBedrock, ProviderAnthropic
Source   Edit
